Title: Scriban has an authorization bypass due to stale include cache surviving TemplateContext.Reset()
Description: `TemplateContext.Reset()` claims that a `TemplateContext` can be reused safely on the same thread, but it does not clear `CachedTemplates`. If an application pools `TemplateContext` objects and uses an `ITemplateLoader` that resolves content per request, tenant, or user, a previously authorized include can be served to later renders without calling `TemplateLoader.Load()` again.
